examples: Inclusions in the gray strip defects consist of MgO and trace melilite, which result from MgO-C refractory in slag line.
The practice showed that the blast furnace slags mainly consisted of melilite, cuspidine, bivalent metallic sulphide and Ce-Ca silica.
Combined red mud phase is mainly composed of quartz and calcium aluminum melilite, followed by albite, andradite garnet, and perovskite garnet.
